home.heroParagraph: Tell us your major and semester. We'll build you a personalized path with interactive lessons, certifications, and real job opportunities.
home.takesSeconds: Takes ~30 seconds. Free for a limited time.
home.everythingYouNeed: Everything you need to launch your career
home.interactiveLessons: Interactive lessons, real certifications, and student jobs — all in one platform.
home.explorePathsDesc: Explore learning paths designed for the most in-demand careers in tech and business.
home.joinStudents: Join WSB Merito students building real skills, earning industry certifications, and landing top jobs.
home.enrollNow: Enroll now — free for a limited time

onboarding.yearDesc: This helps us tailor everything to where you are. Your roadmap will adjust to your current level.
onboarding.programDesc: Your program helps us recommend the right certifications and opportunities tailored for your exact degree.
onboarding.fieldDesc: Go with what excites you right now — you can always explore other fields and pivot later on.

reveal.tailoredFor: Tailored for a <bold>{{year}} Year</bold> studying <bold>{{program}}</bold>. Here is how you bridge the gap to the industry.
reveal.firstLessonDesc: Your first interactive lesson is unlocked and waiting. Jump in and start building real-world {{field}} skills today.
reveal.tryDifferentField: Wait, I want to try a different field

explore.findPath: Find the path that fits your ambition.
explore.eachField: Each field comes with a curated roadmap of certifications, interactive lessons, and real job opportunities. Choose a direction to see how far you can go.
explore.noSignUp: No sign-up required. Choose a path to preview real outcomes.

dashboard.completedAllLessons: You have completed all available lessons for your field.
dashboard.completeMoreSkills: Complete more skills to unlock job matches.
dashboard.skillsConnectJobs: Your skills connect directly to real job listings. Keep learning to see where your path leads.
dashboard.personalizedReady: Your personalized learning path, certifications, and job matches are ready.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.subtitle: Bite-sized, interactive lessons to build real skills. Learn by doing — not watching.

jobs.title: Opportunities for students
jobs.subtitle: Real internships and working student positions in Poland. Curated from LinkedIn — March 2026.
jobs.noMatchingDesc: We couldn't find any jobs matching your current filters. Try broadening your search.

certificates.title: Certifications
certificates.subtitle: Real certifications with verified prices, exam codes, and direct links to official registration pages.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or may have been moved. Head back to the home page and pick a field to explore.

bento.lessonDesc: Every lesson is hands-on. Drag, build, and experiment — then see the results play out in real time. No passive videos. No walls of text.

homepageLesson.mazeDesc: Learn how queues and stacks power two different search strategies — then use one to navigate a maze.
homepageLesson.queueDesc: A queue is first in, first out — just like a line at a coffee shop. The person who arrived first gets served first. BFS uses a queue to explore a maze layer by layer.
homepageLesson.stackDesc: A stack is last in, first out — like a pile of plates. The most recent item added is the first one removed. DFS uses a stack to dive deep into one path before backtracking.
homepageLesson.quizQuestion: Which data structure explores neighbors level by level?
homepageLesson.correct: Correct! Queue processes layer by layer.
homepageLesson.correctAnswer: Correct! Queue processes layer by layer.
